titles.title: There Will Be a Happy Meeting

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: There will be a happy meeting in Heaven, I know When we see the many loved ones we've known here below Gathered on that blessed hilltop with hearts all aglow That will be a glad reunion day

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: A glad day, a wonderful day Glad day, a glorious day There with all the holy angels and loved ones to stay That will be a glad reunion day

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: When we live a million years in that wonderful place Basking in the love of Jesus, beholding His face It will seem but just a moment of praising God's grace That will be a glad reunion day
